774.content:
### Overview
The armor features leathery brown and deep green tones, accented with bronze details. Its visual style incorporates reptilian textures and plated sections, suitable for a combatant.

### How to Obtain
The pieces of the Gladiator's Wyrmhide set can be purchased from PvP vendors in Northrend Dalaran. Alliance players can find Knight-Lieutenant Moonstrike, while Horde players can visit Magistrix Vesara. Each item requires Marks of Honor.

### Tips
*   Obtaining the full set is straightforward, requiring only Marks of Honor from various PvP activities.
*   The Helm and Spaulders are prominent pieces that can be easily paired with other leather sets featuring natural or draconic themes.
